name: Yellow Squash Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt margarine over medium heat.
2. Saute squash and onion until crisp-tender.
3. Remove from the heat; stir in chilies, crackers, salt, and pepper.
4. Spoon into a greased 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Top with cheese.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes.
